chapter_title: Gen. Provisions Relating to Vehicle Size & Weight
text: The board may adopt rules necessary to implement and enforce this chapter.
markdown:
# Transp. Code
## Title 7
### Chapter 621. Gen. Provisions Relating to Vehicle Size & Weight
##### § 621.008 — Rulemaking Authority

The board may adopt rules necessary to implement and enforce this chapter.

*Added by Acts 2011, 82nd Leg., R.S., Ch. 1345 (S.B.1420), Sec. 58, eff. September 1, 2011.*

subsections.text: The board may adopt rules necessary to implement and enforce this chapter.

history.raw: Added by Acts 2011, 82nd Leg., R.S., Ch. 1345 (S.B.1420), Sec. 58, eff. September 1, 2011.
